chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C. P. No.S-416 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For order on office objections No.1 to 6 a/w reply as at ‘A’. 2. For hearing of main case. 02.06.2025 Mr. Khalid Saifullah, Advocate for the Petitioners. Mr. Ahmed Khan Khaskheli, AAG Sindh. SIP Naseem Khan of PS Shah Abdul Latif Bhatti. Inspector Amanullah of PS Korangi. ------------------------------- Through the instant petition, the petitioners have claimed protection at the hands of private respondents as the petitioner No.1 is a sui juris and contracted marriage of freewill without the consent of her parents, which unceremonial act annoyed them. The police officials at the instance of private respondents are harassing them and they intend to harm them. On notices, the official respondents viz. SSP Thatta, SSP Malir and SHO PS Shah Latif Town have filed their replies which are taken on record in which they have submitted that they will act strictly in accordance with law and provide protection to the petitioners as and when it is required. In view of the above, learned counsel is satisfied and seeks disposal of the petition. Order accordingly. The petition is disposed of and the official respondents are directed to provide protection to the petitioners as and when it is required. J U D G E Asif
